'''talovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbolt|headbolt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbolt|headbolt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| talovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæleveth|tæleveth]] || [[word:tælevej|tælevej]] || [[word:tælevesh|tælevesh]] || [[word:tæleve|tæleve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:talolovoth|talolovoth]] || [[word:talolovoj|talolovoj]] || [[word:talolovosh|talolovosh]] || [[word:talolovo|talolovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:talovoth|talovoth]] || [[word:talovoj|talovoj]] || [[word:talovosh|talovosh]] || [[word:talovo|talovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:talofvoth|talofvoth]] || [[word:talofvoj|talofvoj]] || [[word:talofvosh|talofvosh]] || [[word:talofvof|talofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:talovotho|talovotho]] || [[word:talovojo|talovojo]] || [[word:talovosho|talovosho]] || [[word:talovoko|talovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:talovoth|talovoth]] || [[word:talovoj|talovoj]] || [[word:talovosh|talovosh]] || [[word:talovo|talovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:talovothol|talovothol]] || [[word:talovojol|talovojol]] || [[word:talovoshol|talovoshol]] || [[word:talovokol|talovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:talovothotho|talovothotho]] || [[word:talovojojo|talovojojo]] || [[word:talovoshosho|talovoshosho]] || [[word:talovoko|talovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:talovothon|talovothon]] || [[word:talovojon|talovojon]] || [[word:talovoshon|talovoshon]] || [[word:talovokon|talovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:talovothoro|talovothoro]] || [[word:talovojoro|talovojoro]] || [[word:talovoshoro|talovoshoro]] || [[word:talovokoro|talovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
